name: ipm-otp-functions
description: Google Cloud Functions for OTP sending and verification

scripts.deploy-send: gcloud functions deploy sendOtp --runtime nodejs20 --trigger-http --allow-unauthenticated --region us-central1
scripts.deploy-verify: gcloud functions deploy verifyOtp --runtime nodejs20 --trigger-http --allow-unauthenticated --region us-central1
scripts.deploy-all: npm run deploy-send && npm run deploy-verify
